title: 道德 vs 合规 / Ethics vs compliance
point: 合规=法律最低线;道德=法律之外仍以客户利益为重、给出公平适当结果。 / Compliance is the legal minimum; ethics goes beyond it for fair, suitable outcomes.
keyfacts: 合法未必合德 / Lawful ≠ ethical
sourceRef: CMFAS M5 — Ethics (Why Professional Ethics Matter)

title: 为何重要 / Why it matters
point: 信息不对称 + 客户信任 → 道德是行业信任的根基。 / Information asymmetry + trust → ethics underpins the industry.
keyfacts: 客户利益优先 / Client interest first
sourceRef: CMFAS M5 — Ethics (Why Professional Ethics Matter)
